items.name_en: [Factory Version] Chanel 23A Mini 31bag Green Tweed
items.name_cn:
[Factory Version] Chanel 23A Mini 31bag Green Tweed
A fluffy teddy style~ Did this grow up eating cute things!! The new 31bag has a plush version, who can resist this! A limited item for Autumn/Winter, the level of popularity is obvious, incredibly soft touch, full of retro sentiment, the essence of the 31 is the lazy feel after folding~ Freshness as a shoulder bag or handbag, the calfskin body is amazing, the combination of leather chain and leather thin shoulder strap is just too lovely~
Size: 22*23*5.5cm
Model: AS4133

items.name_en: гҖҠBlackгҖӢрҹ”®рҹ”®рҹ”®рҹҡ©рҹҡ©рҹҡ©Calfskin CHANEL 26C Hobo Bag, writing a new definition of elegance with a casual attitude! The perfect blend of soft calfskin and metal chains, interpreting a sense of effortless high-end. In the rules of fashion, the word "wander" has never been so elegant. The Hobo Bag, with its unique lazy silhouette and exquisite craftsmanship, redefines the perfect balance between casual and luxury. Design Highlights: Eclectic elegance, made from premium soft leather, presenting a lazy yet structured silhouette. The double chain вӣ“пёҸ closure design is the iconic element of this bag; the metal and leather interwoven strap is not only beautiful but also provides a comfortable wearing experience. The spacious interior breaks the stereotype that niche bags are impractical. Whether daily essentials or small items, they can be easily stored. Styling: The perfect companion from casual to formal рҹ‘ЁвҖҚвқӨпёҸвҖҚрҹ’ӢвҖҚрҹ‘Ё, adding points to the overall look. When paired with a dress or little black dress, it adds a touch of elegance and sophistication to the overall look. A conquering item in the fashion world, this bag has become the first choice for many stars and fashion icons. From Zhou Xun, Liu Wen to Chen Weiteng, whether male or female, everyone can carry their own style, proving this design transcends gender boundaries. Dimensions: Length 35CM, Width 14CM, Height 45cm
